title: lygisma angustifolium
intro: Lygisma angustifolium, a species of flowering plant, is a type of orchid native to tropical Australia. It is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lygisma angustifolium are attributed to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and protect the skin from infections and inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, Lygisma angustifolium is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its roots are also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
